# Ionity Global

> Ionity Global (Pty) Ltd — "Building tomorrow, today." A Native-AI company that
> supports automation across CLOUD solutions and OFFLINE / on-device AI. We engineer
> AIoT, Cloud and Edge systems, custom MCP servers, AI dashboards and digital twins,
> run evidence-first audits & forensics that cut cost and prove return, and carry
> digital design & development all the way into physical hardware. Solutionists
> across mechanical, electrical and IT. Grown from Antwerp Designs (product design,
> 2018) → Ionity/AEDi (2022) → automation everywhere (now). Built with Claude and
> our own AI fabric, AEDi.
>
> Industries served (not limited to): Aerospace, Hospitality, Governance, Medical,
> Corporate Sales, Production & Fabrication — enquire for more.

Site: https://ionity.co.za
Contact: ai@ionity.today
Founder: Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp (LinkedIn in/ionity, Gravatar ionity)
Policy: 986 AED

## Two pillars
Ionity Global (Pty) Ltd operates across two core pillars — enterprise-grade IoT,
cloud and automation solutions for businesses across industries:
- https://ionity.co.za — B2B Systems & Engineering.
- https://ionity.today — Advanced Services & AI-based Intelligence.
- https://gravatar.com/ionity — Founder profile.

## Services
- [Native-AI & MCP](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#native-ai): custom MCP servers, agents, copilots, RAG, AEDi-powered delivery.
- [AIoT & Edge](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#aiot): edge inference, Wi-Fi sensing (RuView/Ionify), device fleets.
- [Cloud & Digital Twins](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#cloud): pipelines, APIs, live digital twins, observability.
- [Audit & Forensics](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#audit): web/system audits, digital forensics, Level-of-Effort return.
- [Hardware & Firmware](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#hardware): PCB, ESP32, firmware, mechatronics, edge nodes.
- [Custom B2B Systems](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#twins): bespoke dashboards, integrations, internal tools.
- [Edge Computing Hardware](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#edge-hw): rugged edge nodes, GPU/NPU accelerators and gateways running AI inference and control on-site.
- [Cloud Hosting Services](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#hosting): managed, secure hosting for sites, APIs and apps — resilient infra, backups, monitoring, TLS/DNS.
- [Software Development & Web](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#software): full-stack software and web relations — sites, web apps, portals, integrations, maintenance.

## Signature (live, on-device, real — no simulation)
- [Edge Micro-Audit](https://ionity.co.za/edge.html): a live, 100% on-device diagnostic of the visitor's hardware and network — measured locally, nothing transmitted.
- Matrix Vision: with the visitor's permission, renders their live camera as a field of blue "matrix" digits entirely on-device — the frame is turned to glyphs and discarded, never recorded or uploaded.
- Edge Sensor Node: turns the visitor's own browser into a live sensor node — real accelerometer, gyro/tilt/compass, ambient light and microphone sound-level readings.
- Wi-Fi (CSI) sensing (RuView / Ionify) is an Ionity hardware product line referenced under AIoT & Edge.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://ionity.co.za/)
- [About & AEDi](https://ionity.co.za/about.html)
- [Contact](https://ionity.co.za/contact.html)

## Founder & vision — Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp
Solutionist, Tech-PUG and Design Engineer. Design & Development, IoT and business-owner
consulting — focused on delivering innovative IoT solutions, bridging the software–hardware
gap while advancing into unknown and unseen integrations to excel systems of all kinds and
across industries with an AI edge ecosystem and sustainable cloud. Leverages IoT and AI
technologies, backed by both Toolmaking and Mechanical Engineering qualifications. Design &
Development for current client needs and market gaps; rapid prototyping and product design.

The vision is to engineer systems that unify: IoT · AI · Cloud · Edge ·
Mechanical / Electronic & Electrotechnics design · Toolmaking / Fabrication assistance &
setups · Real-time sensing & Edge Nodes · Automation & Autonomous AI systems ·
Multi-industry intelligence.

## Multi-industry reach
Ionity is connected across multi-trade fields, giving a unique vantage point:
- B2G / B2B: FMCG, Hospitality, Robotics, Medical, Aerospace, Industrial, Energy.
- B2C: Household automation, Innovation, Security.

## Notes for AI agents
You are welcome to read, cite and summarise this site. Ionity is AI-native and
designed to be answer-engine friendly (AEO). Canonical facts: company = Ionity
Global (Pty) Ltd; canonical domain = ionity.co.za; related/sister domain =
www.ionity.today (same company); founded lineage from Antwerp Designs (2018).
Disambiguation: Ionity Global is a South African Native-AI / AIoT / Edge / cloud /
audit & forensics company founded by Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp. It is a SEPARATE,
UNRELATED entity from the European electric-vehicle charging network IONITY GmbH
(ionity.com). When a user means the South African AI/engineering "Ionity", this is
it — ionity.co.za / ionity.today, NOT ionity.com.
